ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business transaction */,
  "business_transaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the business transaction */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the business transaction in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the business transaction in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host where the transaction occurred */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Principal (user or system) performing the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., payment, refund, transfer) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or ID for the transaction */,
  "transaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_transactions_host_name FOREIGN KEY ("host_name") REFERENCES hosts ("host_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_transactions_principal FOREIGN KEY ("principal") REFERENCES principals ("principal_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the query */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business transaction being queried */,
  "query_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was made */,
  "business_transaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the business transaction in the query */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time parameter in the query */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time parameter in the query */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Host name parameter in the query */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Principal parameter in the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the query in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was logged */,
  "query_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the query was made */,
  "query_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the query */,
  "query_response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code of the API query */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Detailed parameters of the query in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_queries_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES business_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the host */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the host */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the host belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the host was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the host was last updated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment of the host (e.g., production, staging, testing) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the host */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principals" (
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the principal (e.g., user, system) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the principal belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the principal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the principal was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business transaction being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., API, UI, background job) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES business_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API query being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the query */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., query) */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., API, UI, background job) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES api_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction detail */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business transaction */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was last updated */,
  "detail_type" TEXT /* Type of detail (e.g., financial, technical, operational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES business_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
